conversation.content:
Both external tools returned no useful domain-specific results in this environment (snippet search gave unrelated ML papers; web search returned nothing). I'll note this and justify from the established Meisl/Cohen/Knowles chemical-kinetics framework I already know.

**Key established principle I'm relying on:** In the Meisl/Knowles master-equation treatment, the secondary nucleation *rate* saturates with monomer concentration — it is not unbounded polynomial growth but follows a saturating (Michaelis/Hill-like) form `rate ∝ m^n/(K^n + m^n)`. This is exactly the structural principle behind my Hill term `c²/(K² + c²)`: cooperative onset with saturation. Inhibitors that act on secondary nucleation shift the effective saturation constant and delay the half-time — captured by putting `cd` into the Hill threshold K². This confirms my structure is physically grounded rather than an arbitrary functional form.

Since the tools returned no additional detail, I'll finalize the program as designe
